comment: Hyperparameter configuration for training. Set algorithm to 'dqn' or 'ppo'.
comment_random_seed: Seed for reproducibility. Set to null for non-deterministic runs. Experiment manager overrides this.
comment_network_type: Options: 'linear' (no hidden layers), 'large_hidden' (512 neurons), 'game_based' (hierarchical [52,13,15]). Backward compatible: 'boolean', 'embedding', 'multi_encoder'
comment_use_embeddings: Use embeddings for preprocessing instead of boolean inputs. Previous experiments showed embeddings achieve 62% win rate vs 18% for boolean. This allows fair architecture comparison while using a representation that actually learns.
comment_zone_encoded_dim: Dimension of each zone encoding after aggregation. Game-based: 52 (one per card).
comment_game_based_scale: Scale factor for game-based architecture. When set, uses [52*k, 13*k, 15*k] hidden layers. Increased from 1 to 2 to address catastrophic loss divergence. [104, 26, 30] provides 2x capacity and less severe bottleneck.
comment_game_based_hidden_layers: Optional explicit game-based hidden layer sizes (list of ints). If null, uses [52*scale, 13*scale, 15*scale]. Alternative: [104, 52, 26] for wider bottleneck (less compression).
comment_embedding_size: Kept for backward compatibility, no longer used (no embeddings - all inputs are boolean arrays)
eps_decay_comment: Slower decay (30k) retains exploration into rounds 5-10, reducing risk of bad local optima.
learning_rate_comment: Reduced from 1e-4 to 3e-5 for more stable learning. Model was learning (loss decreasing) but not improving performance, suggesting unstable updates. Quick test mode enabled for debugging.

ppo.comment: Used when algorithm is 'ppo'. Use embedding input when use_embeddings is true. Avoid aggressive compression (e.g. [128,12,8]); [128,128] or [256,128] are safer.

training.quick_test_mode_comment: Enabled for debugging. Running 5 rounds with 100 episodes each to quickly test if learning rate reduction improves performance.
training.validation_episodes_ratio_comment: Used only if validation_episodes_per_position is null: total = eps_per_round * ratio, per_position = total/2.
training.validation_episodes_per_position_comment: Episodes as trainee from P1 and same from P2 per validation opponent (125 per side). Matches peak DQN / PPO experiment scripts.
training.extended_validation_comment: Every N rounds (e.g. 5) run extended_validation_episodes_per_position per position for robust checkpoint analysis.
training.exploration_boost_on_regression_comment: When >0, if validation win rate drops from previous round, boost epsilon for next round by this many steps (e.g. 5000) to escape plateaus.
training.reward_mode_comment: binary = WIN/LOSS/DRAW; normalized_score_diff = (my_score - opp_score)/21 clamped to [-1,1]
